app.title: Lumen
app.tagline: A space to observe yourself and care for your body and mind.

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.notePlaceholder: Anything you want to remember about today
checkin.error: Couldn't save your check-in. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Your history
dashboard.empty: No check-ins yet — your first one will show up here.

register.title: Create your account
register.ageNotice: Lumen is only available to adults (18+).
register.error: Couldn't create your account. Please check your details and try again.

consent.title: Before you check in
consent.description: Lumen needs your explicit consent to process the wellbeing data you log (mood, energy, sleep). You can revoke it at any time — check-ins simply pause until you grant it again.

assessment.title: Wellbeing check
assessment.instructions: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following?

items.1: Little interest or pleasure in doing things
items.3: Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much
items.4: Feeling tired or having little energy
items.6: Feeling bad about yourself — or that you are a failure, or have let yourself or your family down
items.7: Trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television
items.8: Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed — or the opposite, being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual
items.9: Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself in some way

items.1: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge
items.2: Not being able to stop or control worrying
items.3: Worrying too much about different things
items.5: Being so restless that it's hard to sit still
items.7: Feeling afraid, as if something awful might happen

assessment.tooSoon: You already completed this check-in recently. You can retake it in 30 days.
assessment.error: Something went wrong submitting your answers. Please try again.

band.MINIMAL: Your wellbeing score is in a minimal range.
band.MILD: Your wellbeing score is in a mild range — worth keeping an eye on.
band.MODERATE: Your wellbeing score is in a moderate range — worth paying closer attention to.
band.PRONOUNCED: Your wellbeing score is in a pronounced range — this might be a good time to talk to someone.
band.ELEVATED: Your wellbeing score is in an elevated range — consider seeking professional support.

crisis.title: Let's pause here for a moment
crisis.message: One of your answers suggests you might be going through something difficult right now. Lumen is a wellbeing companion, not an emergency service — the resources below can offer real support.
crisis.disclaimer: If you are in immediate danger, please contact emergency services.
